riegel_estimate.note: Riegel estimate based on: Bourton Mile, Cardiff 5K (previous edition), Gloucester 10K. Excluded (compromised conditions): Lightning Bolt 10K (First race back after off-season. Logged for history, but excluded from prediction — 3+ months old and early-season fitness isn't representative of current form for a race this far out.), Hereford 5K (GI issues from bicarbonate trial.), Cotswold Way Relay (leg) (Respiratory episode in heat. Relay leg, off-road and extremely hilly — not comparable to a flat standalone race. Excluded from Riegel projection.)

vo2max_note: VO2max is 56.0, stable over the recent window.
key_sessions_note: Logged for reference only — not converted into a predicted time. Converting interval-rep pace to race pace has no reliable formula; use your own judgement on what these sessions suggest.
